fields.summary: Provides static methods for encoding images and image sequences to the WebP format.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoder` is a static class with methods to encode a single <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap> to WebP data, or to encode multiple frames as an animated WebP. Encoded data can be written to an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKData>, an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWStream>, or a `System.IO.Stream`.

Pass an `SKWebpEncoderOptions` to control quality, compression, and other encoding parameters.

## Examples

```csharp
using var pixmap = bitmap.PeekPixels();
var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(pixmap, options);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP format and returns the result as <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP format and writes the result to the specified stream.

params.dst: The destination stream to write the encoded WebP data to.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP format and writes the result to the specified managed stream.

params.dst: The destination managed stream to write the encoded WebP data to.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (System.IO.Stream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP and returns the result as <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded animated WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? EncodeAnimated (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP and writes the result to the specified stream.

params.dst: The destination stream to write the encoded animated WebP data to.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP and writes the result to the specified managed stream.

params.dst: The destination managed stream to write the encoded animated WebP data to.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (System.IO.Stream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);
